items.title: Zaragoza GK banned 13 games for punching rival
items.summary: Real Zaragoza goalkeeper Esteban Andrada has been handed a huge 13-game ban after punching an opponent in the face during last weekend's defeat against Huesca.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: IPL 2026: Ryan Rickelton scripts history with fastest-ever MI hundred
items.summary: Ryan Rickelton made a sensational return to the Mumbai Indians playing XI, smashing the fastest century in franchise history during their IPL 2026 match against Sunrisers Hydera...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: GT need bowlers and middle order to fire against fearsome RCB
items.summary: A win for RCB will take them to the top of the table while a GT win will help them break away from a logjam in the bottom half
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
